name: superskills
description: Less is more: minimal coding harness — self-learning, convention discovery, requirement clarification, final test pass.

interface.shortDescription: Minimal coding harness: memory, conventions, clarification, final tests.
interface.longDescription: Less is more. superskills keeps the four things that still compound in value as models get stronger: persistent learnings from past sessions, a minimal evidenced convention spec discovered from your codebase, clarification of genuinely undecided requirements before coding, and one result-driven test pass after development. Four skills, nothing else.
defaultPrompt: Use the discover skill to generate project conventions
Use the learn skill to persist this session's learnings
Use the clarify skill before implementing my request
